content: The World Biogas Association (WBA) has signed a historic agreement with the Brazilian State Government of SÃ£o Paulo, launching a strategic partnership to implement the #MakingBiogasHappen programme â€“ a global initiative unlocking the full potential of anaerobic digestion (AD) and biogas for climate action, energy security, waste management, and the circular economy.
